creator: Sarah Perez
title: (No AI) After sale of its shoe business, Allbirds pivots to AI
dc:creator: Sarah Perez
content: Allbirds is ditching wool sneakers for AI servers, rebranding as NewBird AI after locking in a $50M convertible financing facility.
contentSnippet: Allbirds is ditching wool sneakers for AI servers, rebranding as NewBird AI after locking in a $50M convertible financing facility.

creator: Sarah Perez
title: (No AI) Reid Hoffman weighs in on the ‘tokenmaxxing’ debate
dc:creator: Sarah Perez
content: Reid Hoffman says tracking AI token use can gauge adoption, but cautions it should be paired with context and not treated as a direct productivity metric.
contentSnippet: Reid Hoffman says tracking AI token use can gauge adoption, but cautions it should be paired with context and not treated as a direct productivity metric.

title: (No AI) Allbirds announced a switch from shoes to AI and its stock jumped 600 percent
author: Richard Lawler
content:
![Picture of an Allbirds store in the SoHo neighborhood of New York](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/gettyimages-1253153052.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Allbirds had a hit a decade ago with its Wool Runner shoes, but after a $4 billion IPO in 2021, the business never turned a profit, and sales dropped nearly 50 percent between 2022 and 2025. The company recently [announced](https://ir.allbirds.com/news-releases/news-release-details/allbirds-signs-definitive-asset-purchase-agreement-american) it would sell off its name and assets for $39 million to American Exchange after closing the remaining stores. That shell listing, however, still has some use as the _[Financial Times](https://www.ft.com/content/a4b63cc1-2d1c-44c8-a22a-425cf0efb5cf)_ points out, and now CEO Joe Vernachio has [announced a plan](https://ir.allbirds.com/news-releases/news-release-details/allbirds-inc-executes-50m-convertible-financing-facility) to raise $50 million from an unnamed investor, which will turn NewBird AI into "a fully integrated GPU-as-a-Service (GPUaaS) and AI-native cloud solutions provider."

> NewBird AI expects …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/news/912484/allbirds-ai-hyperscale)

Allbirds had a hit a decade ago with its Wool Runner shoes, but after a $4 billion IPO in 2021, the business never turned a profit, and sales dropped nearly 50 percent between 2022 and 2025. The company recently announced it would sell off its name and assets for $39 million to American Exchange after closing the remaining stores. That shell listing, however, still has some use as the Financial Times points out, and now CEO Joe Vernachio has announced a plan to raise $50 million from an unnamed investor, which will turn NewBird AI into "a fully integrated GPU-as-a-Service (GPUaaS) and AI-native cloud solutions provider."
NewBird AI expects …

Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) Adobe embraces conversational AI editing, marking a ‘fundamental shift’ in creative work
author: Jess Weatherbed
content:
![A screenshot of the Firefly AI Assistant editing a headshot.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/Adobe-Firefly-Innovations-Visual-Asset.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

You don’t need to understand any fancy editing terms — just describe what changes you want to make. | Image: Adobe

Adobe is fully embracing AI tools that enable creators to edit their work using descriptive prompts, instead of manually using specific Creative Cloud apps. The software giant's new Firefly AI Assistant allows users to describe what they want to change by typing their own words into a conversational interface.

Adobe says this marks a "fundamental shift in how creative work is done" by removing skill barriers and laborious tasks, while still giving creatives full control over their work. It'll be "available soon" on the Firefly AI studio platform according to Adobe, though no specific launch date was provided in the announcement.

The unifi …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/912287/adobe-firefly-ai-assistant-announcement-editing)

title: (No AI) Allbirds Is Pivoting to AI Compute. Sure, Why Not

title: (No AI) AI Slop Is Making the Internet Fake-Happy
